## Patch-release

This is a patch release that fixes several bugs:

* The position adjustment in `subset_count_position()` didn't work when `show` or `hide` was not `NULL`.
* `highlight()` could not handle non-recursive input generated by `generate_ellipse_path()`.
* `venn_summary()` didn't return a value when `show_elements = TRUE`.

## R CMD check results

0 errors | 0 warnings | 1 note

* Days since last update: 6
